description: An image caption rendered as a figcaption element inside a figure.imgcapt, displaying descriptive text below an image.

stories.name: LongerCaption
stories.description: A caption with more descriptive text

props.children: Some of the main Drosophila stock collection.

stories.name: Group
stories.description: Multiple captions as they appear in a gallery context

instances.children: Fly lab - Room D22 Firth Court

notes: The figcaption element carries no CSS class of its own — it is styled via the 'figure figcapt figcaption' selector in the global stylesheet. The root figure element uses class 'imgcapt'. This component models only the figcaption itself. The rootClassName is intentionally empty as the element has no class.
